name: Duran's Cactus

seo.title: Duran's Cactus — Mexican Restaurant in West Little Rock | Metro Little Rock
seo.description: Duran's Cactus is the West Little Rock Mexican restaurant that's been the neighborhood's quiet standard for years — honest Tex-Mex, serious margaritas, and a patio worth knowing about.

address: 11100 N Rodney Parham Rd, Little Rock, AR 72212
description: Duran's Cactus has been a West Little Rock institution long enough that the regulars think of it as their restaurant, which it essentially is. The Tex-Mex menu is exactly what it should be — cheese dip that people drive across the metro for, enchiladas with the right amount of sauce, fajitas that come out on a properly sizzling platter. The margaritas are strong and not overthought. The covered patio is one of the better places to spend a warm evening in the 72212 zip code. Lunch draws the office crowd; dinner draws families and couples who've been going there for years and see no reason to stop.
must_try_items: Queso (get the large, you'll need it)
Chicken enchiladas with sour cream sauce

related.title: Best Mexican in Metro Little Rock
